zh.lifeSummary: 當William Borthwick於1420年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安格雷布利其時，他的父親William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick39歲，母親Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair31歲。他於1427年與Rachel de la Haya結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1459年被列為ambassador to england。他去世於1483年10月在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在美國維吉尼亞州斯特費爾德米德洛迪安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Borthwick于1420年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安格雷布利其时，他的父亲William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick39岁，母亲Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair31岁。他于1427年与Rachel de la Haya结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1459年被列为ambassador to england。他去世于1483年10月在他的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在美国弗吉尼亚州斯特費爾德米德洛迪安。

nameMeanings.name: Borthwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the old barony of Borthwick, formerly Loquhariot (Midlothian) and possibly also from Borthwick (Roxburghshire). The placenames are from Old English bord ‘board, table’ + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Borthwick was born in 1420, in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick, was 39 and his mother, Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair, was 31. He married Rachel de la Haya in 1427. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. In 1459, at the age of 39, his occupation is listed as ambassador to england. He died in October 1483, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Midlothian, Chesterfield, Virginia, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Borthwick est né en 1420, à Gorebridge, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Rachel de la Haya en 1427. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. En 1459, à l’âge de 39 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est ambassador to england. Il est décédé en octobre 1483, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Midlothian, Chesterfield, Virginie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Borthwick 1420 in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick 39 und seine Mutter Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair 31. Er hat 1427 Rachel de la Haya geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. 1459, als er 39 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als ambassador to england aufgeführt. Er starb im Oktober 1483 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Midlothian, Chesterfield, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Borthwick è nato il nel 1420 nel Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Rachel de la Haya nel 1427. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Nel 1459, all'età di 39 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come ambassador to england. Morì nel ottobre 1483, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Midlothian, Chesterfield, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: William Borthwickが1420年にスコットランドミドロスアンゴアブリッジで生まれた時，父William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwickは39歳，母Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclairは31歳であった。1427年にRachel de la Hayaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。1459年，39歳の時，職業はambassador to englandと記録されている。彼は1483年10月に故郷で63歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国バージニア州チェステルフィールドミドロスアンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Borthwick(이)가 1420년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 고레브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1427년 Rachel de la Haya(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1459년, 39세의 나이로 그의 직업은 ambassador to england이었다. 그는 1483년 10월 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 버지니아 주 체스터필드 미들로스이언에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Borthwick nasceu em 1420, em Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Rachel de la Haya em 1427. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Em 1459, com 39 anos, sua profissão aparece como ambassador to england. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1483, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Midlothian, Chesterfield, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América.

ro.Halheriot, Midlothia, Scotland: Midlothian, Chesterfield, Virginia, Statele Unite ale Americii

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Borthwick родился в 1420 г. в местности горебридж, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Rachel de la Haya в 1427 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1459 году, в возрасте 39 лет,  он работал по профессии ambassador to england. Он умер октябрь 1483 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности мидлотян, честирфиелд, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.

sm.Halheriot, Midlothia, Scotland: Midlothian, Chesterfield, Virginia, Iunaite Setete o Amerika

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Borthwick nació en 1420, en Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Beatrice,Bethoc Sinclair, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Rachel de la Haya en 1427. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. En 1459, a la edad de 39 años, su ocupación registrada era ambassador to england. Murió en octubre de 1483, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Midlothian, Chesterfield, Virginia, Estados Unidos.
